title: Are the Mass production Evas
wikitext:
[]: Are the Mass-production Evas... Post by Executor » Fri Mar 30, 2007 8:23 pm actually weaker, or inferior, than Unit 02? I know Asukas a Great piolet and all that jazz, but how in the hell did she nearly knockout all 8 or nine before she got lanced? Sorry, just need specifics

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 30, 2007 8:37 pm If you want Seele's technical specifications, you'll have to fanwank them. But this might be Relevant To Your Interests. (Search string: "harpies suck".)

[]: Post by Kyle » Fri Mar 30, 2007 8:44 pm Cause she's badass that's why.Though apparently not badass enough to not get lanced.I do belive that the MP eva's are in general,weaker.They are after all MP models.

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Mar 30, 2007 8:44 pm My PoV is, a-weaker, those them thar harpies!

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Mar 30, 2007 8:53 pm Which is stronger? The one that needs to be stronger at the moment in order to advance the plot. Duh.

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Mar 30, 2007 8:57 pm EM deserves an internet for that...

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Mar 30, 2007 9:01 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: EM deserves an internet for that...

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Mar 30, 2007 9:07 pm Being blunt can be just as funny too...(but in a different way though)

[]: Post by BobBQ » Fri Mar 30, 2007 9:58 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Although I'm sure I could have come up with a more humorous way of saying "Stop asking stupid fucking questions before the internet catches itself on fire".

[]: Post by Executor » Fri Mar 30, 2007 10:09 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Which is stronger? The one that needs to be stronger at the moment in order to advance the plot. Duh.

[]: Post by Tokpile Quohog » Fri Mar 30, 2007 10:21 pm Executor wrote: You know, you can directly call me a fucking idiot, you know. Because, you know, I was asking the question because both dont seem equal in power in a non-plot fuel fight. Gee, now I know not to ask a fucking question here.

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 30, 2007 10:25 pm BobBQ wrote: It seems to me that the real question is, "How much does having a moronic autopilot hurt an Eva's ability to perform?"

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Mar 30, 2007 10:27 pm Executor wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Which is stronger? The one that needs to be stronger at the moment in order to advance the plot. Duh.

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 30, 2007 10:35 pm Something tells me that no good can come of this thread. I'm doing it for the public good.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Mar 30, 2007 11:15 pm Mmmm... smells like narrativium.
